mapper.select: /* selectShippingInvoiceHead */ SELECT WH.SHPDCKY, MW.WHNAMLC, WH.VOWNKEY, MO.VONAMLC , MV.VHCFNAM, WI.SKUDESC , IF((WI.CUSTCOD IS NULL OR TRIM(WI.CUSTCOD) = ''), WI.CUSTNAM, MC.CUNAMLC) AS CUNAMLC , WI.REGIMOD, CONCAT('[', WI.REGIMOD, '] ', MR.RENAMLC) AS RENAMLC, WI.DESTMOD , CONCAT(IF((WI.DEMODNM IS NULL OR TRIM(WI.DEMODNM) = ''), MD.DENAMLC, WI.DEMODNM), '(', WI.DEMDADR , ' / ', WI.DEMPOCD, ' / ', WI.DEMDTLN, ' / ', WI.DEMDMAN, ')') AS DEMODNM , COUNT(WI.SHPDCKY) as ITEMCNT , SUM(WI.SKUWEIG) as SKWGSUM , SUM(WI.GROSSWG) as GRWGSUM , CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(WH.SPEHDAT,'%Y-%m-%d'), ' ', DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(WH.SPEHTIM,'%H%i%s'),'%H:%i:%s')) AS SPEHDAT , MW.WARTELN, MW.PROOFYN FROM ${userData.schema}.WSHPIT WI INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.WSHPHD WH ON WH.SHPDCKY = WI.SHPDCKY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MWARMA MW ON MW.WAREKEY = WI.WAREKEY AND MW.WHUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.commonSchema}.MVHCMA MV ON MV.VOWNKEY = WH.VOWNKEY AND MV.VEHICKY = WH.VEHICKY AND MV.VHUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.commonSchema}.MVOWMA MO ON MO.VOWNKEY = WH.VOWNKEY AND MO.VOUSEYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCUSMA MC ON MC.CUSTKEY = WI.CUSTCOD AND MC.CUDELYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MREGMA MR ON MR.REGIKEY = WI.REGIMOD AND MR.REUSEYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${userData.schema}.MDESMA MD ON MD.REGIKEY = WI.REGIMOD AND MD.CUSTKEY = WI.CUSTCOD AND MD.DESTKEY = WI.DESTMOD AND MD.DEUSEYN = 'Y' WHERE WI.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND WI.SHPDCKY = #{param.shpdcky} GROUP BY WH.SHPDCKY, MW.WHNAMLC, WH.VOWNKEY, MO.VONAMLC , MV.VHCFNAM, WI.SKUDESC, MC.CUNAMLC, WI.REGIMOD, MR.RENAMLC , WI.DESTMOD, MD.DENAMLC , WH.SPEHDAT, WH.SPEHTIM , MW.WARTELN

/* selectShippingInvoiceHeadList */ SELECT WH.SHPDCKY, WH.WAREKEY, MW.WHNAMLC, WH.VOWNKEY, MO.VONAMLC , MV.VHCFNAM, WI.SKUDESC , IF((WI.OWNERKY IS NULL OR TRIM(WI.OWNERKY) = ''),WI.OWNRNAM,MC1.CUNAMLC) AS OWNRNAM , IF((WI.CUSTCOD IS NULL OR TRIM(WI.CUSTCOD) = ''),WI.CUSTNAM,MC2.CUNAMLC) AS CUNAMLC , WI.FNCUSKY , WI.REGIMOD, CONCAT('[', WI.REGIMOD, '] ', MR.RENAMLC) AS RENAMLC, WI.DESTMOD , CONCAT(IF((WI.DEMODNM IS NULL OR TRIM(WI.DEMODNM) = ''), MD.DENAMLC, WI.DEMODNM), '(', WI.DEMDADR , ' / ', WI.DEMPOCD, ' / ', WI.DEMDTLN, ' / ', WI.DEMDMAN, ')') AS DEMODNM , IF((WI.DEMODNM IS NULL OR TRIM(WI.DEMODNM) = ''), MD.DENAMLC, WI.DEMODNM) AS DENAMLC , COUNT(WI.SHPDCKY) as ITEMCNT , SUM(WI.SKUWEIG) as SKWGSUM , SUM(WI.GROSSWG) as GRWGSUM , CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(WH.SPEHDAT,'%Y-%m-%d'), ' ', DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(WH.SPEHTIM,'%H%i%s'),'%H:%i:%s')) AS SPEHDAT , MW.WARTELN, MW.PROOFYN FROM ${userData.schema}.WSHPIT WI INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.WSHPHD WH ON WH.SHPDCKY = WI.SHPDCKY INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MWARMA MW ON MW.WAREKEY = WI.WAREKEY AND MW.WHUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.commonSchema}.MVHCMA MV ON MV.VOWNKEY = WH.VOWNKEY AND MV.VEHICKY = WH.VEHICKY AND MV.VHUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.commonSchema}.MVOWMA MO ON MO.VOWNKEY = WH.VOWNKEY AND MO.VOUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MREGMA MR ON MR.REGIKEY = WI.REGIMOD AND MR.REUSEYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCUSMA MC1 ON MC1.CUSTKEY = WI.OWNERKY AND MC1.CUDELYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCUSMA MC2 ON MC2.CUSTKEY = WI.CUSTCOD AND MC2.CUDELYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${userData.schema}.MDESMA MD ON MD.REGIKEY = WI.REGIMOD AND MD.CUSTKEY = WI.CUSTCOD AND MD.DESTKEY = WI.DESTMOD AND MD.DEUSEYN = 'Y' WHERE WI.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND WI.SHPDCKY = #{param.shpdcky} GROUP BY WH.SHPDCKY, WH.WAREKEY, MW.WHNAMLC, WH.VOWNKEY, MO.VONAMLC , MV.VHCFNAM, WI.SKUDESC, WI.OWNERKY, WI.CUSTCOD, WI.CUSTNAM, MC1.CUNAMLC, MC2.CUNAMLC, WI.FNCUSKY, WI.REGIMOD, MR.RENAMLC , WI.DESTMOD, MD.DENAMLC , WH.SPEHDAT, WH.SPEHTIM, MW.WARTELN

/* selectShippingInvoiceItem */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY WI.SHPDCKY) AS ROWNUM , WI.SHPDCKY, MW.WHNAMLC , WI.SKUMKEY, WI.SKUWEIG, WI.SKUWIDT, WI.SKULENG, WI.SKUTHIC , WI.GROSSWG, WI.GROSSLN, WI.GROSSWD, WI.GROSSTH , WI.ORDERLN, WI.PURCNUM, WI.STLOTNB , MC.CUNAMLC, MG.GRPKYNM, WI.DELVDSR , CONCAT(WI.FRAREKY, ' ', WI.FRLOCKY) AS SAVEPOS , AI.SKUSTRD, AI.INDIMET, AI.OUTDIMT FROM ${userData.schema}.WSHPIT WI INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MWARMA MW ON MW.WAREKEY = WI.WAREKEY AND MW.WHUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MREGMA MR ON MR.REGIKEY = WI.REGIMOD AND MR.REUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${userData.schema}.MGRPMA MG ON MG.SKUGRKY = WI.SKUGRKY AND MG.GRUSEYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${userData.schema}.MCUSMA MC ON MC.CUSTKEY = WI.CUSTCOD AND MC.CUDELYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN DO_DY.WASNIT AI ON WI.WAREKEY = AI.WAREKEY AND WI.SKUMKEY = AI.SKUMKEY WHERE WI.WAREKEY = #{param.warekey} AND WI.SHPDCKY = #{param.shpdcky} AND WI.CUSTNAM = #{param.cunamlc} AND WI.OWNRNAM = #{param.ownrnam} AND WI.REGIMOD = #{param.regimod} AND WI.DEMODNM = #{param.denamlc}
